title: Reactions of 2, 3, 4-Trichlorothiophene with Magnesium
author: M. T. RAHMAN
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Iowa State University, Ames, Iowa 50010, U.S.A. 

  Manuscript received 16 June 1975; accepted 21 August 1975  

 2. 3. 4-Trichlorothiophene reacts with magnesium in the presence of ethylene bromide as an entrainer to give 3, 4-dichlorothiophene and (trichloro-2-thienyI)-magnesium halide. A probable mechanism has been discussed.
